## Overview

**v0.5.0-rc6 вЂ” Arch package build fix (`makepkg --noextract` removed).**

Same intent as `v0.5.0-rc5`: validate the Arch Linux `.pkg.tar.zst` job and the
declared `.deb` / `.rpm` dependencies end-to-end in CI before the final tag.

`rc5` ran the new Arch matrix job successfully through the container pull,
zig build, non-root `makepkg` drop and fakeroot stage, but `package()` failed
with `install: cannot stat '.../src/tildaz'`: `makepkg --noextract` skips the
step that links local `source=()` files into `$srcdir`, so the package step
could not find the staged binary. Fix: drop `--noextract` (plain source files
are symlinked into `$srcdir` by the normal extract step).

All other artifacts (Windows / macOS / Linux tar.gzВ·debВ·rpmВ·AppImage Г— archs)
uploaded successfully in `rc5`, including the newly-declared package
dependencies. If `rc6` is fully green, the final `v0.5.0` is cut from the same
commit. Full release content is in `dist/release-notes/v0.5.0.md`.
